# Instrument Sans

Gapless bundles the Instrument Sans variable font from the official Google
Fonts repository so the interface works without a network connection.

- Upstream: https://github.com/google/fonts/tree/main/ofl/instrumentsans
- Font: `assets/fonts/InstrumentSans-VariableFont_wdth,wght.ttf`
- License: SIL Open Font License 1.1 (`assets/fonts/OFL.txt`)
- Integrity record: `assets/fonts/SHA256SUMS`
